author: Contributors
description: A local-first personal funds tracker for income, expenses, credit card payments, lending, dashboard notes, and Canvas summaries. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: MI-Lin
manifest.description: A local-first personal funds tracker for income, expenses, credit card payments, lending, dashboard notes, and Canvas summaries.
manifest.name: Personal Funds

name: Personal Funds

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Store records in sync-friendly Markdown (`records.md`).
- Automatically import legacy `records.json` files.
- Automatically find and restore the data folder after moving to a new computer.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## Personal Funds 1.0.2

Bug fixes and data reliability improvements.

- Added a vault-based `records.json` database to keep records safer across plugin updates.
- Added a `Read` action to reload records from the database.
- Added a plugin setting for the data folder.
- Added separate Markdown summary notes for the five top summary cards.
- Changed dashboard updates to only update the default dashboard file.
- Preserved user-added Canvas nodes and links when updating the generated Canvas.
- Fixed the current account credit card reminder so it shows the credit card amount only.

releases.author: MiLin-Jad
releases.description:
## Personal Funds 1.0.1

Initial community release.

- Track income, expenses, credit card expenses, repayments, lending, and account adjustments.
- Generate a local Markdown funds dashboard.
- Generate an Obsidian Canvas summary.
- Support Chinese and English interface switching.
- Store all data locally in Obsidian plugin data.
